texto: You must become a free man so that you have “Sidik Paningal; Java” (lucidity and precision of sight). Later, you achieve the peak of detachment of sight (Ma’rifat), where you see something to the horizon with great clarity. Do not take another step before you are certain that the path you take is the right one. Failure is another matter; what matters is precision.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Emha Ainun Nadjib sobre temas ligados a sucesso. A afirmação “You must become a free man so that you have “Sidik Paningal; Java” (lucidity and precision of sig…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, failure, lucidity, útil em momentos de lucidity e ma-rifat.
